name: 원본원단
prompt: Preserve the sofa's original upholstery material exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not change the material type, texture, grain, gloss level, seams, stitching, panel divisions, or upholstery finish. Material changes must not alter the sofa structure or cushion shape.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

name: 패브릭
prompt: Apply a premium woven upholstery fabric with a soft, dense, refined textile weave and a mostly matte surface. The fabric should look warm, comfortable, realistic, and suitable for a high-quality sofa. Change only the upholstery surface material and preserve every structural detail of the sofa.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

colors.name: 아이보리
colors.prompt: Apply a soft warm ivory color. It should be brighter than beige but softer and warmer than pure white. Avoid strong yellow tones and preserve realistic fabric texture.

colors.name: 딥그린
colors.prompt: Apply a deep muted green color with calm, natural, sophisticated, and premium characteristics. Avoid bright emerald, neon, or fluorescent green.

colors.name: 차콜
colors.prompt: Apply a deep charcoal gray color. It should look dark, refined, neutral, and softer than pure black while preserving visible fabric texture.

colors.name: 인디핑크
colors.prompt: Apply a muted dusty indie pink color with a soft, elegant, calm, and slightly desaturated appearance. Avoid vivid, fluorescent, or strongly saturated pink.

colors.name: 그레이블루
colors.prompt: Apply a muted gray-blue color that balances soft blue and neutral gray. The result should feel calm, modern, sophisticated, and not like vivid royal blue.

name: 실리콘가죽
prompt: Apply premium matte silicone leather with a smooth, clean, refined leather-like surface. Use a mostly matte finish with very subtle soft reflections. It should look modern, durable, realistic, and easy to clean without appearing excessively glossy or plastic.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

colors.name: 화이트
colors.prompt: Apply a clean soft white color. Keep the material texture and seams visible. Avoid overexposure, harsh blue tones, or featureless pure white.

colors.name: 베이지
colors.prompt: Apply a soft warm beige color with calm, natural, and neutral characteristics. Avoid making the result strongly yellow or orange.

colors.name: 올리브
colors.prompt: Apply a muted olive green color with a calm, natural, sophisticated, and slightly warm appearance. Avoid bright or fluorescent green.

colors.name: 카멜
colors.prompt: Apply a warm camel brown color that balances tan and warm brown tones. Avoid overly orange, bright yellow, or artificial-looking color.

colors.name: 스모키그레이
colors.prompt: Apply a medium-dark smoky gray color with a soft, muted, modern, and slightly warm appearance. Avoid cold metallic gray.

colors.name: 블랙
colors.prompt: Apply a deep premium black color while preserving visible material texture, seams, cushion contours, and natural highlights. Do not turn the sofa into featureless pure black.

name: 실리콘가죽(유광)
prompt: Apply premium glossy silicone leather with a smooth refined surface and clearly visible elegant reflections. The gloss should follow the sofa curves naturally and look polished and luxurious, but never metallic, wet, or artificial plastic.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

colors.name: 화이트
colors.prompt: Apply a clean soft white color with controlled glossy highlights. Preserve seams, cushion contours, and surface detail without overexposing the sofa.

colors.name: 카멜
colors.prompt: Apply a warm camel brown color with balanced tan and brown tones. Preserve elegant glossy reflections without making the color overly orange.

colors.name: 블랙
colors.prompt: Apply a deep glossy premium black color. Preserve leather-like surface detail, seams, cushion contours, and elegant controlled reflections. Avoid featureless black areas.

name: 천연가죽
prompt: Apply premium natural leather with subtle realistic grain, soft depth, gentle highlights, and natural tonal variation. The leather should look elegant, durable, supple, and high-quality without excessive gloss or artificial plastic texture.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

colors.name: 아이보리
colors.prompt: Apply a soft warm ivory leather color. It should be brighter than beige but softer and warmer than pure white, with realistic leather grain and subtle tonal variation.

colors.name: 그레이
colors.prompt: Apply a balanced medium gray leather color with neutral, elegant, and realistic characteristics. Preserve natural leather grain and highlights.

colors.name: 라이트그레이
colors.prompt: Apply a soft light gray leather color. It should remain clearly gray while looking bright, clean, neutral, and refined.

colors.name: 카멜
colors.prompt: Apply a warm camel leather color with balanced tan and warm brown characteristics. Preserve realistic leather grain and natural tonal depth.

colors.name: 스카이블루
colors.prompt: Apply a soft muted sky-blue leather color. The result should feel bright, airy, calm, sophisticated, and not strongly saturated.

colors.name: 그린
colors.prompt: Apply a refined natural green leather color with a balanced, slightly muted, premium appearance suitable for high-quality furniture.

name: 천연가죽(이태리)
prompt: Apply premium Italian natural leather with fine sophisticated grain, rich depth, elegant tonal variation, soft refined highlights, and a supple luxurious appearance. The surface should feel high-end and realistic, with no artificial plastic texture or excessive gloss.

colors.name: 원본색상
colors.prompt: Preserve the original sofa color exactly as shown in the product reference image. Do not intentionally recolor the sofa. Allow only slight and natural color variation caused by the selected lighting.

colors.name: 유로스노우
colors.prompt: Apply a refined Euro Snow color: a very bright warm off-white with a subtle creamy undertone. It should remain softer and warmer than pure white.

colors.name: 딥크림
colors.prompt: Apply a rich deep cream color with warm creamy tones, gentle beige undertones, and a soft luxurious appearance.

colors.name: 릴리그레이
colors.prompt: Apply a soft Lily Gray color: a pale elegant gray with a subtle warm undertone and a clean premium appearance.

colors.name: 얼그레이오렌지
colors.prompt: Apply an Earl Gray Orange color: a sophisticated muted warm orange softened by gray undertones. Avoid vivid orange, tangerine, or strongly saturated results.

colors.name: 포레스트그린
colors.prompt: Apply a deep Forest Green color with rich muted dark-green tones, natural depth, and a luxurious appearance. Avoid bright emerald green.

colors.name: 브스케블루
colors.prompt: Apply a refined deep muted blue color with subtle gray undertones and a calm premium appearance. Avoid vivid cobalt or royal blue.

colors.name: 꼬냑
colors.prompt: Apply a rich cognac leather color with warm reddish-brown tones, subtle amber undertones, natural depth, and realistic tonal variation.

colors.name: 엘리펀트차콜
colors.prompt: Apply an Elephant Charcoal color: a deep warm charcoal gray with subtle brown undertones. It should look softer and more dimensional than pure black.

colors.name: 클라우드화이트
colors.prompt: Apply a soft Cloud White color with a clean warm-white appearance and gentle softness. Avoid harsh blue, yellow, or overexposed white.

colors.name: 플럼핑크
colors.prompt: Apply a sophisticated Plum Pink color with muted dusty-pink tones, subtle plum undertones, and a calm luxurious appearance. Avoid vivid magenta.

colors.name: 허쉬브라운
colors.prompt: Apply a rich Hush Brown color with deep warm muted-brown tones, soft chocolate undertones, and natural earthy depth.

colors.name: 다크나이트블랙
colors.prompt: Apply a Dark Night Black color: an extremely deep luxurious black with subtle cool depth. Preserve visible leather grain, seams, highlights, cushion contours, and dimensional detail.
